checks.description: Ensure that Q never takes an undefined (X) value after reset release, regardless of latency.
notes: Conservative guardrail; timing unknown, so no cycle bound.
checks.pass_condition: Q remains 0 or a defined 64-bit value (no X or Z) for all observed cycles post-reset.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset is deasserted and the design is clocked.

checks.description: Verify that Q exhibits the Johnson counter progression pattern without assuming exact cycle counts.
notes: Pattern observed over multiple cycles; exact latency not required.
checks.pass_condition: Sequence of Q values matches the Johnson sequence (e.g., 0x0, then a series where bits shift and invert) over successive clock edges.
checks.trigger_condition: After reset release, on each rising edge of clk.
